sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value Nullable(Int32), created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
SELECT id, greaterOrEquals(value, 5) AS is_greater_or_equals FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY greaterOrEquals(value, 15) HAVING greaterOrEquals(SUM(value), 20 AND value IS NULL);
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE greaterOrEquals((SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL), 5) AND created_at IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE second_table (ref_id UInt32, amount Nullable(Double));
SELECT t.id, greaterOrEquals(t.value, s.amount) AS comparison_result FROM test_table t JOIN second_table s ON t.id = s.ref_id WHERE s.amount IS NULL;
SELECT id, greaterOrEquals(value, (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM second_table WHERE amount IS NOT NULL)) AS is_avg_greater FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, greaterOrEquals(value, 0) AS comparison FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL HAVING comparison = 0;
